Description_Short: AMD GPU system management library for monitoring and control
Description_Long: AMD System Management Interface (AMD-SMI) provides programmatic access to AMD GPU metrics, telemetry, and device control. Includes runtime libraries for querying GPU utilization, temperature, power consumption, and clock frequencies. Ships with library binaries, runtime components, development headers, and documentation for building GPU monitoring and management applications.

Description_Short: ROCm LLVM compiler toolchain with HIP compilation support
Description_Long: LLVM-based compiler infrastructure optimized for AMD GPUs. Provides rocm-llvm compiler with AMD GPU backend support and hipcc (HIP compiler driver) for compiling HIP C++ code. Includes runtime libraries and documentation for heterogeneous computing development on ROCm platforms.

Description_Short: ROCm LLVM compiler development headers and libraries
Description_Long: Development package for ROCm LLVM compiler infrastructure. Contains header files, static libraries, and build configuration files for rocm-llvm and hipcc. Required for building applications that integrate with the ROCm LLVM toolchain or extend compiler functionality.

Description_Short: AMD HIP runtime libraries for running GPU programs on the ROCm platform
Description_Long: HIP runtime libraries providing GPU kernel execution, memory management, and device control APIs. Enables portable GPU computing across AMD and NVIDIA platforms. Includes runtime binaries, shared libraries, and documentation for developing GPU-accelerated applications.

Description_Short: AMD HIP runtime development headers and build files
Description_Long: Development package for HIP runtime. Contains C++ header files, CMake configuration, and static libraries required for building HIP applications. Provides APIs for device management, kernel launches, memory operations, and stream control on AMD GPUs.

Description_Short: ROCm FFT library test suite and validation binaries
Description_Long: Comprehensive test suite for rocFFT and hipFFT libraries. Includes unit tests, performance benchmarks, and correctness validation tools for Fast Fourier Transform operations on AMD GPUs. Provides test binaries and verification utilities for FFT algorithm implementation.

Description_Short: ROCm Fast Fourier Transform libraries for GPU computation
Description_Long: High-performance FFT library implementations for AMD GPUs. Provides rocFFT (native ROCm FFT library) and hipFFT (portable FFT API). Supports 1D, 2D, and 3D transforms with optimized kernels for various data sizes and precision levels. Includes runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: ROCm FFT development headers and build configuration files
Description_Long: Development package for rocFFT and hipFFT libraries. Contains header files, CMake modules, and static libraries for integrating FFT functionality into applications. Provides C and C++ APIs for configuring and executing FFT operations on AMD GPUs.

Description_Short: ROCm Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms libraries for GPUs
Description_Long: Comprehensive BLAS implementation optimized for AMD GPUs. Includes hipBLAS (portable BLAS API), rocBLAS (optimized native implementation), hipBLASLt (GEMM-focused library), and hipSPARSELt (sparse matrix operations). Provides Level 1, 2, and 3 BLAS routines with runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: ROCm linear algebra solver test suite and validation tools
Description_Long: Test suite for rocSOLVER and hipSOLVER libraries. Includes unit tests, numerical accuracy validation, and performance benchmarks for linear system solvers, eigenvalue problems, and matrix factorizations. Provides test executables for verifying LAPACK-equivalent functionality on AMD GPUs.

Description_Short: ROCm sparse matrix library test suite and benchmarks
Description_Long: Comprehensive test suite for rocSPARSE and hipSPARSE libraries. Contains unit tests, correctness validation, and performance benchmarks for sparse matrix operations including SpMV, SpMM, and sparse linear solvers. Provides test binaries for verifying sparse BLAS functionality.

Description_Short: ROCm BLAS library test suite and validation executables
Description_Long: Test suite for hipBLAS, rocBLAS, and hipBLASLt libraries. Includes unit tests, numerical accuracy validation, and performance benchmarks for BLAS Level 1, 2, and 3 operations. Provides test executables for verifying matrix operations, GEMM variants, and linear algebra routines on AMD GPUs.

Description_Short: ROCm BLAS development headers and static libraries
Description_Long: Development package for ROCm BLAS libraries. Contains header files, CMake configuration, and static libraries for hipBLAS, rocBLAS, hipBLASLt, and hipSPARSELt. Provides C and C++ APIs for integrating high-performance linear algebra operations into GPU-accelerated applications.

Description_Short: ROCm sparse matrix computation libraries for AMD GPUs
Description_Long: Optimized sparse matrix libraries for AMD GPUs. Includes rocSPARSE (native sparse BLAS implementation) and hipSPARSE (portable sparse matrix API). Supports sparse matrix-vector operations, format conversions, sparse linear solvers, and preconditioners. Ships with runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: ROCm sparse matrix library development headers and build files
Description_Long: Development package for rocSPARSE and hipSPARSE libraries. Contains header files, CMake modules, and static libraries for integrating sparse matrix operations into applications. Provides APIs for CSR, COO, ELL matrix formats and sparse linear algebra routines.

Description_Short: ROCm LAPACK-equivalent linear algebra solver libraries
Description_Long: GPU-accelerated linear algebra solver libraries for AMD GPUs. Includes rocSOLVER (LAPACK functionality for ROCm) and hipSOLVER (portable solver API). Provides dense matrix factorizations, linear system solvers, eigenvalue decompositions, and SVD. Ships with runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: ROCm solver library development headers and configuration
Description_Long: Development package for rocSOLVER and hipSOLVER libraries. Contains header files, CMake configuration, and static libraries for building applications with GPU-accelerated LAPACK functionality. Provides APIs for matrix factorizations, linear solvers, and eigenvalue problems.

Description_Short: ROCm pseudo-random and quasi-random number generation libraries
Description_Long: High-performance random number generation libraries for AMD GPUs. Includes rocRAND (native ROCm RNG library) and hipRAND (portable RNG API). Supports multiple algorithms (XORWOW, MRG32k3a, MTGP32, Philox, Sobol) for pseudo-random and quasi-random sequences. Ships with runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: ROCm random number generation test suite and benchmarks
Description_Long: Test suite for rocRAND and hipRAND libraries. Includes statistical validation tests, performance benchmarks, and correctness verification for random number generators. Provides test executables for validating distribution quality and generation performance across different RNG algorithms.

Description_Short: ROCm RNG development headers and build configuration files
Description_Long: Development package for rocRAND and hipRAND libraries. Contains header files, CMake modules, and static libraries for integrating random number generation into GPU applications. Provides C and C++ APIs for configuring RNG algorithms and generating random sequences.

Description_Short: ROCm GPU compute primitives test suite and validation tools
Description_Long: Test suite for rocPRIM, hipCUB, and rocThrust libraries. Includes unit tests, algorithm correctness validation, and performance benchmarks for parallel primitives such as scan, reduce, sort, and transform. Provides test executables for verifying GPU compute primitive functionality.

Description_Short: ROCm parallel primitive development headers and templates
Description_Long: Development package for rocPRIM, hipCUB, and rocThrust libraries. Contains header-only C++ template libraries providing GPU-accelerated parallel primitives. Includes algorithms for sorting, scanning, reduction, and transformation operations optimized for AMD GPU architectures.

Description_Short: ROCm foundational profiling tools and tracing infrastructure
Description_Long: Base profiling infrastructure for ROCm applications. Includes rocprofiler-sdk (profiling API framework), aqlprofile (low-level AQL packet profiling), roctracer (API tracing library), and rocprof-trace-decoder (trace analysis utilities). Provides runtime libraries, development headers, and documentation for building performance analysis tools.

Description_Short: ROCm application profiling and performance analysis tools
Description_Long: Comprehensive profiling tools for ROCm GPU applications. Includes rocprofiler-compute (compute workload profiler) and rocprofiler-systems (system-level performance analysis). Provides kernel profiling, hardware counter collection, API tracing, and timeline analysis. Ships with profiler executables, libraries, and documentation.

Description_Short: Automated CUDA to HIP source code translation tool
Description_Long: HIPIFY is a source-to-source translation tool that automatically converts CUDA C++ code to portable HIP C++. Supports CUDA Runtime API, CUDA Driver API, cuBLAS, cuFFT, cuRAND, cuSPARSE, and other CUDA libraries. Enables migration of CUDA applications to run on both AMD and NVIDIA GPUs through the HIP abstraction layer.

Description_Short: ROCm essential utilities and system management components
Description_Long: Core ROCm platform utilities and system components. Includes rocm-smi (system management interface CLI), rocm-core (base runtime components), rocminfo (device capability query tool), and rocprofiler-register (profiler registration utilities). Provides essential tools for GPU discovery, monitoring, and platform initialization with runtime libraries, development files, and documentation.

Description_Short: AMD ROCm OpenCL runtime implementation for GPU compute
Description_Long: OpenCL 2.2 runtime implementation for AMD GPUs on ROCm platform. Provides ICD (Installable Client Driver) for executing OpenCL kernels, managing GPU devices, and interoperating with other ROCm components. Includes runtime libraries and OpenCL platform layer for cross-platform GPU computing.

Description_Short: AMD ROCm OpenCL development headers and build configuration
Description_Long: Development package for ROCm OpenCL implementation. Contains OpenCL C/C++ header files, ICD loader configuration, and build tools for developing OpenCL applications targeting AMD GPUs. Provides OpenCL 2.2 API declarations and platform-specific extensions.

Description_Short: ROCm platform system dependencies and required packages
Description_Long: System-level dependencies and prerequisite packages for ROCm platform. Aggregates required kernel drivers, compiler toolchains, system libraries, and runtime dependencies needed for ROCm functionality. Ensures proper environment configuration for GPU computing on AMD platforms.

Description_Short: Shared hipBLAS header files for BLAS library variants
Description_Long: Header-only library providing common declarations and interfaces for hipBLAS and hipBLASLt. Contains shared C++ headers, type definitions, and API declarations used across hipBLAS library variants. Required for building applications using hipBLAS-family libraries.

Description_Short: Shared math library components and sparse matrix utilities
Description_Long: Common mathematical library components for ROCm ecosystem. Includes host-side sparse matrix utilities, shared data structures, and auxiliary functions used across ROCm math libraries. Provides runtime libraries, development headers, and documentation for mathematical computing infrastructure.

Description_Short: Composable Kernel library for high-performance ML primitives
Description_Long: Composable Kernel (CK) provides a C++ template library and kernel generator for writing performance-critical machine learning kernels. Delivers optimized GEMM, convolution, normalization, and attention operations across multiple AMD GPU architectures. Includes runtime binaries, development headers, and documentation for ML framework integration.

Description_Short: Composable Kernel development headers and build files
Description_Long: Development package for Composable Kernel library. Contains C++ template headers, CMake configuration, and build utilities for creating custom high-performance GPU kernels. Provides composable kernel abstractions for building ML primitives optimized for AMD GPU architectures.

Description_Short: RCCL collective communication test suite and benchmarks
Description_Long: Test suite for ROCm Communication Collectives Library. Includes multi-GPU communication tests, collective operation validation, and performance benchmarks for AllReduce, AllGather, Broadcast, Reduce, and ReduceScatter. Provides test executables for verifying distributed GPU communication functionality.

Description_Short: ROCm multi-GPU collective communication library for distributed computing
Description_Long: RCCL (ROCm Communication Collectives Library) provides optimized primitives for multi-GPU and multi-node collective operations. Implements high-bandwidth communication patterns (AllReduce, AllGather, Broadcast, Reduce, ReduceScatter) for distributed deep learning and HPC workloads. Includes runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: RCCL development headers and build configuration files
Description_Long: Development package for ROCm Communication Collectives Library. Contains header files, CMake modules, and static libraries for integrating multi-GPU collective operations into distributed applications. Provides C and C++ APIs for configuring communication patterns and topologies.

Description_Short: ROCm OpenSHMEM library for GPU-centric intra-kernel networking
Description_Long: rocSHMEM implements the OpenSHMEM specification for GPU-initiated communication. Enables symmetric memory access patterns and one-sided communication directly from GPU kernels without CPU intervention. Provides partitioned global address space (PGAS) programming model for distributed GPU computing with runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: rocSHMEM development headers and build configuration
Description_Long: Development package for rocSHMEM library. Contains header files and build configuration for developing applications using GPU-initiated OpenSHMEM communication. Provides device-side APIs for symmetric memory operations, atomics, and collective communications in distributed GPU environments.

Description_Short: MIOpen deep neural network primitives library for AMD GPUs
Description_Long: MIOpen is AMD's library for high-performance deep learning primitives. Provides optimized implementations of convolutions, pooling, normalization, activation functions, RNN/LSTM layers, and other neural network operations. Includes multiple algorithm variants with auto-tuning capabilities for optimal performance across AMD GPU architectures.

Description_Short: MIOpen deep learning library test suite and validation tools
Description_Long: Comprehensive test suite for MIOpen library. Includes unit tests, numerical accuracy validation, and performance benchmarks for convolution algorithms, activation functions, pooling operations, and recurrent layers. Provides test executables for verifying deep learning primitive correctness.

Description_Short: MIOpen development headers and build files for DNN applications
Description_Long: Development package for MIOpen deep neural network library. Contains C/C++ header files, CMake configuration, and static libraries for integrating GPU-accelerated deep learning primitives. Provides APIs for configuring convolution algorithms, managing tensor descriptors, and executing neural network operations.

Description_Short: ROCm Data Center management and GPU telemetry collection tools
Description_Long: ROCm Data Center Tools (RDC) provides enterprise-grade GPU management, monitoring, and diagnostics. Features include health monitoring, telemetry collection, job statistics, policy enforcement, and administrative controls for data center GPU deployments. Ships with runtime services, development libraries, and documentation.

Description_Short: ROCm source-level GPU debugger based on GDB infrastructure
Description_Long: ROCgdb is AMD's source-level debugger for GPU kernels on Linux. Built on GDB infrastructure with AMD GPU architecture support for kernel debugging, wavefront inspection, and memory examination. Provides breakpoints, single-stepping, variable inspection, and backtrace functionality for HIP and OpenCL kernels with runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: rocDecode video decoding library test suite and samples
Description_Long: Test suite and sample applications for rocDecode library. Includes unit tests, codec validation, and example programs demonstrating GPU-accelerated video decoding workflows. Provides test executables for verifying H.264, H.265, VP9, and AV1 decoding functionality using VA-API backend.

Description_Short: GPU-accelerated video decode library using VA-API backend
Description_Long: rocDecode provides high-performance video decoding on AMD GPUs through VA-API integration. Supports H.264, H.265/HEVC, VP9, and AV1 codecs with hardware-accelerated decode pipelines. Enables efficient video processing workflows with GPU compute integration. Includes runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: rocDecode development headers and build configuration files
Description_Long: Development package for rocDecode video decoding library. Contains C/C++ header files, CMake modules, and API declarations for integrating GPU-accelerated video decode into applications. Provides interfaces for decoder initialization, format configuration, and decoded frame access.

Description_Short: rocJPEG library test suite and validation executables
Description_Long: Test suite for rocJPEG library. Includes unit tests, decoding correctness validation, and performance benchmarks for JPEG baseline and progressive formats. Provides test executables for verifying GPU-accelerated JPEG decode functionality using VA-API backend.

Description_Short: GPU-accelerated JPEG decode library using VA-API backend
Description_Long: rocJPEG provides high-performance JPEG image decoding on AMD GPUs through VA-API integration. Supports baseline and progressive JPEG formats with hardware-accelerated decode pipelines. Optimized for batch image processing and computer vision workflows. Includes runtime libraries and documentation.

Description_Short: rocJPEG development headers and build configuration
Description_Long: Development package for rocJPEG library. Contains C/C++ header files, CMake configuration, and API declarations for integrating GPU-accelerated JPEG decoding. Provides interfaces for decoder configuration, batch processing, and decoded image buffer management.

Comments: Meta Package defintions start from here. There will not be any artifactory for meta packages.
Description_Short: ROCm core runtime metapackage with essential GPU libraries
Description_Long: Metapackage aggregating core ROCm runtime components and libraries. Installs essential runtime dependencies for GPU computing including HIP runtime, base utilities, and fundamental libraries. Provides complete runtime environment for executing ROCm applications without development tools.

Description_Short: ROCm core runtime metapackage with essential GPU libraries
Description_Long: Metapackage aggregating core ROCm runtime components and libraries. Installs essential runtime dependencies for GPU computing including HIP runtime, base utilities, and fundamental libraries. Provides complete runtime environment for executing ROCm applications without development tools.

Description_Short: ROCm core development metapackage with headers and build tools
Description_Long: Metapackage aggregating core ROCm development components. Installs compiler toolchains, runtime development headers, CMake modules, and build utilities required for developing ROCm applications. Provides complete development environment for building GPU-accelerated software.

Description_Short: ROCm development tools metapackage with profiling and debugging
Description_Long: Metapackage aggregating ROCm developer tools and utilities. Installs profilers (rocprofiler, rocprof), debugger (rocgdb), code translation tools (hipify), and performance analysis utilities. Provides complete toolchain for optimizing and debugging GPU applications.

Description_Short: ROCm Fortran compiler and runtime support metapackage
Description_Long: Metapackage for ROCm Fortran programming support. Aggregates Fortran compiler infrastructure, runtime libraries, and language-specific utilities for GPU-accelerated Fortran applications. Enables Fortran HPC workloads on AMD GPUs through ROCm platform.

Description_Short: ROCm OpenCL platform metapackage with runtime and development
Description_Long: Metapackage aggregating complete OpenCL environment for ROCm. Installs OpenCL runtime (ICD), development headers, and platform utilities. Provides full OpenCL 2.2 implementation for cross-platform GPU computing on AMD hardware.

Description_Short: ROCm OpenMP offload support metapackage for GPU parallelism
Description_Long: Metapackage for OpenMP GPU offloading on ROCm platform. Aggregates compiler support for OpenMP target directives, runtime libraries for GPU execution, and offload infrastructure. Enables directive-based GPU parallelism for C, C++, and Fortran applications.

Description_Short: Complete ROCm SDK metapackage with development tools and OpenCL
Description_Long: Comprehensive ROCm SDK metapackage aggregating development environment and tools. Combines core runtime/development packages, developer tools (profilers, debugger), and OpenCL support. Provides complete software development kit for building, optimizing, and debugging GPU-accelerated applications on ROCm platform.
